body:
{"incident_id": "inc-20260512174052-78f7e4ae", "analysis": "```json
{
  "summary": "The CloudWatch alarm 'aiops-dev-demo-workload-errors-critical' has entered the ALARM state due to a manual storage test for incident audit trail.",
  "likely_root_causes": [
    "The manual storage test may have caused an increase in errors or exceptions in the workload.",
    "There could be an issue with the storage configuration or access that is causing the errors."
  ],
  "immediate_triage_steps": [
    "Confirm the alarm name and state in CloudWatch.",
    "Open the Lambda log group /aws/lambda/aiops-dev-demo-workload.",
    "Review the latest log stream and identify the request ID.",
    "Check if errors were caused by a controlled test event with force_error=true.",
    "Confirm whether FORCE_ERROR environment variable is true."
  ],
  "safe_remediation_options": [
    "If FORCE_ERROR is true, set it back to false.",
    "Do not delete the Lambda function during an incident.",
    "Do not change IAM permissions unless the root cause is proven.",
    "Any automated remediation must require manual approval."
  ],
  "evidence_to_collect": [
    "Screenshot of the CloudWatch alarm state.",
    "Screenshot of the Lambda log group.",
    "Relevant request ID from the failed invocation.",
    "Any configuration change made during remediation."
  ],
  "escalation_needed": true
}
```"}
